TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cyaqung_ni_arung, title = Cyaqung_ni_arung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyaqung_ni_arung} }

S.FORM: == Cyaqung ni arung == Snruan kari utux Pu-nong-cu- cyaqung ni arung Seuxal o niqan kingal seejiq ni kingal arung,dha nii o mseupu musa hruan spriq,pspung psqama gmiya. Rmngaw seejiq ka arung: nmai spama ka gmiya haw, yaku o mniq ku gmiya hiya. spama gmiya ka seejiq do, asi nhari kmarig dxgal ka arung, krmux Ruwan dxgal stling na. mhdu spama ka gmiya do,
S.PHON: == ʦjaquŋ ni aɾuŋ == snɾuan kaɾi utux pu-noŋ-ʦu- ʦjaquŋ ni aɾuŋ səuxal o niqan kiŋal səəɟiq ni kiŋal aɾuŋ,dħa nii o msəupu musa ħɾuan spɾiq,pspuŋ psqama gmija. ɾmŋaw səəɟiq ka aɾuŋ: nmai spama ka gmija ħaw, jaku o mniq ku gmija ħija. spama gmija ka səəɟiq do, asi nħaɾi kmaɾig dxgal ka aɾuŋ, kɾmux ɾuwan dxgal stliŋ na. mħdu spama ka gmija do,
S.FORM: == Cyaqung ni arung == Snruan kari utux Pu-nong-cu- cyaqung ni arung Seuxal o niqan kingal seejiq ni kingal arung,dha nii o mseupu musa hruan spriq,pspung psqama gmiya. Rmngaw seejiq ka arung: nmai spama ka gmiya haw, yaku o mniq ku gmiya hiya. spama gmiya ka seejiq do, asi nhari kmarig dxgal ka arung, krmux Ruwan dxgal stling na. mhdu spama ka gmiya do,
S.PHON: == ʦjaquŋ ni aɾuŋ == snɾuan kaɾi utux pu-noŋ-ʦu- ʦjaquŋ ni aɾuŋ səuxal o niqan kiŋal səəɟiq ni kiŋal aɾuŋ,dħa nii o msəupu musa ħɾuan spɾiq,pspuŋ psqama gmija. ɾmŋaw səəɟiq ka aɾuŋ: nmai spama ka gmija ħaw, jaku o mniq ku gmija ħija. spama gmija ka səəɟiq do, asi nħaɾi kmaɾig dxgal ka aɾuŋ, kɾmux ɾuwan dxgal stliŋ na. mħdu spama ka gmija do,
